{{Expand}}

{{Infobox spell
| name = Eyes of Malice
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Eyes of Malice]] is a niche pathfinding spell that provides a path for someone looking for the caster with hostile intentions.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Spells]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
